description: HR has received a legal order to garnish an employee's wages for child support.

nodes.task_description: Receive and validate the legal garnishment order.

expected_outcome.value: Payroll specialist confirms the order is legally valid.

nodes.task_description: Enter the garnishment details (e.g., amount, recipient) into the payroll system for the specified employee.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist correctly sets up the recurring deduction in the HRIS.

nodes.task_description: Send a notification to the employee informing them that the company has received the order and will begin deductions.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist sends the required legal notification to the employee.
